_doc: Terminal SUCCESS transfer snapshot. The progress seam (slskd.transfer_progress) treats a state containing 'Completed' AND 'Succeeded' as terminal success (A3 robust rule). state='Completed, Succeeded' is LIVE-OBSERVED on the NAS 2026-05-31 (04-05-LIVE-PROBE.md, ZHU – BLACK MIDAS, 14 FLAC tracks) — pinned in app/adapters/slskd.py:STATE_COMPLETED_SUCCEEDED; tests reference the named constant, not a literal.
